nasb.text: I know that there is nothing better for them than to rejoice and to do good in one’s lifetime;

esv.text: I perceived that there is nothing better for them than to be joyful and to do good as long as they live;

cnv.text: 我曉得人生最好是尋樂享福，

ccb.text: 我认识到，人生在世没有什么比欢乐、享受更好。

csbs.text: 我知道：人一生中没有什么比喜乐和行善更好的；
